title: Quality Equipment
description: Introduces a wide variety of reforges for all types of equipment
body:
![a](https://imgur.com/zjsTXd5.png) --- ### **
Quality Equipment introduces the reforging station into the game, which allows for granting qualities to all your equipment, all of which amplify various attributes.
**

To reforge your tools, you will need a reforging station, In which you will combine equipment with Its repair item. If a repair item does not exist for the equipment, It will use the default material set in the config. Repair items can be overriden and equipment without repair items can have items defined in the config aswell.
## Tool qualities ![a](https://imgur.com/WEeEdAd.png)![a](https://imgur.com/JVStw6b.png)![a](https://imgur.com/HTxy3md.png)![a](https://imgur.com/tssA9SZ.png)![a](https://imgur.com/cQ2TQGS.png)![a](https://imgur.com/t1khbFF.png)![a](https://imgur.com/A6JstSg.png)![a](https://imgur.com/MFNdI2k.png)![a](https://imgur.com/m1LHIup.png)![a](https://imgur.com/ksphzZE.png)![a](https://imgur.com/vld8dve.png)![a](https://imgur.com/sJfZKd0.png)![a](https://imgur.com/ndL0bhi.png)![a](https://imgur.com/2RGaIXM.png)![a](https://imgur.com/pPn5Oec.png)![a](https://imgur.com/CkCWs37.png)![a](https://imgur.com/6iIyIxe.png) ## Bow/Crossbow qualities ![a](https://imgur.com/du1Qydb.png)![a](https://imgur.com/3OPxlM0.png)![a](https://imgur.com/GlmnbmW.png)![a](https://imgur.com/eeNxGmw.png)![a](https://imgur.com/1wc8mRy.png) ## Armor qualities ![a](https://imgur.com/xEZi4aS.png)![a](https://imgur.com/6J6ilcJ.png)![a](https://imgur.com/44dag8D.png)![a](https://imgur.com/cn7ebxY.png)![a](https://imgur.com/9z3Ro04.png)![a](https://imgur.com/j1CGSNb.png)![a](https://imgur.com/McNW83t.png)![a](https://imgur.com/nOFhYmo.png)![a](https://imgur.com/num2PeZ.png)![a](https://imgur.com/GGIyKVu.png)![a](https://imgur.com/7EPPyMG.png)![a](https://imgur.com/iBFtI1E.png)![a](https://imgur.com/hftKp9m.png) ## Shield qualities ![a](https://imgur.com/vEyJWI7.png)![a](https://imgur.com/0UxsqC0.png)![a](https://imgur.com/cAttw0Y.png) ## Bauble qualities (1.21.1+) ![a](https://imgur.com/ZydJD2E.png)![a](https://imgur.com/9idPtF3.png)![a](https://imgur.com/WK5mhfX.png)![a](https://imgur.com/oYmxHxZ.png)![a](https://imgur.com/90yYK0x.png)![a](https://imgur.com/WBcVGTq.png)![a](https://imgur.com/JoA0YgB.png)![a](https://imgur.com/IPagRXH.png)![a](https://imgur.com/Bokokzd.png)![a](https://imgur.com/e2FACH2.png)![a](https://imgur.com/AG0s0CQ.png)![a](https://imgur.com/vJV03kb.png)![a](https://imgur.com/60QzByf.png)![a](https://imgur.com/nSk3k0E.png)![a](https://imgur.com/bBdZzx9.png)![a](https://imgur.com/4Zfz0R3.png) Qualities are supported by all curios compatible baubles. You will need to set materials for them in the config, otherwise they will use the global rerforge material fallback. The mod also adds the emerald ring and emerald amulet in case there are no bauble mods installed. They can be reforged with emeralds. ![a](https://imgur.com/qAzaAyh.png) --- **
All qualities are fully customizable in the mod's config in 1.20.1 and datapack in 1.21.1. Attributes can be tweaked, added or removed, qualities can be renamed, removed, and completely custom ones can be created.**
